name: Imricor Medical Systems Inc.
analysis: IMR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 17% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.8650, stop A$1.6186, target A$2.0600 (0.79:1) — then trail it.
